prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-5PCGOLDKIT-BLU-14IN-3LB Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3LB Paydirt Gold Panning Kit with Beginner Prospecting Tools Equipment 6pc, Blue Description: Learn how to pan for gold like a miner 49'er with this five piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. Sourced from his gold rich claim site, you'll be able to learn gold panning techniques at home to pan for gold like a seasoned gold miner.

The ASR Outdoor 6 piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included five essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a modern dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting precious ores. There is a 3oz gold snifter bottle that can be used to grab small gold flakes at the bottom of your gold pan, fill it with water to suck up your small gold pickers and use the included glass collection vials to safely store them.

We partnered with Bobby Bo to bring you this fun beginner gold pan gold panning kit for beginners so you can watch online videos and follow along at home before heading out into the field on your next camping trip. Bobby Bo gold paydirt is packed with size 20 and size 30 mesh coarse gold flake and fine gold flour with nearly no black sand or magnetite so you will not have to do any separation processing to find your gold in the paydirt. This bag of paydirt gold was expertly designed to practice gold prospecting techniques, not to make you rich. Bobby Bo is a gold prospecting expert who specializes in teaching classes of all ages about gold panning and gold mining.

Grab this kit for yourself, a friend or family member who enjoys outdoor activities like camping and hiking. Its fun to find gold out it nature but learning how with the proper techniques is your first step in this fun outdoor hobby,

Good luck and we hope you have a lot of fun with this paydirt gold pan gold panning kit. Search Terms: Alaskan gold paydirt gold panning kit for adults snifter bottle gold pan with pay dirt starter kit mining equipment black sand fine gold recovery prospecting tools Features: - 3LB GUARANTEED GOLD PAYDIRT: Each beginner gold pan kit comes with a 3 pound bag of paydirt (total weight) and each pay dirt bag contains fine gold flour and coarse gold flakes in the 20-30 mesh size range; Sealed in premium resealable bag - DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Best in class prospectors mining gold pan has large and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other material; lightweight, high contrast colors with carabiner hole - FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS: (1) gold snifter bottle designed to suction pick up gold flakes and gold flour; (2) small glass vials with screw cap; (1) magnification loupe; (1) tweezers - 14 INCH GOLD PAN: Rough up the gold pan before first use, seasoning the pan by washing off all factory production oils - SPECIFICATIONS: Materials plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Color: Blue; Glass vial capacity: 1 dram (.065oz), 1 2/3 dram (.1oz) air tight plastic lid; Dual riffle gold pan size: 14” diameter; Gold snifter bottle; Pay dirt bag size: 3LB === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
